creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Yes, I've started with 
http://imapsync.lamiral.info/dist which shows version 1.921. But I've checked https://github.com/imapsync/imapsync. I'm not sure but I think github version is freen (open source) while then newest one is "commercial". That's why I did not changed to http://imapsync.lamiral.info/dist as source of tar archive.
